ColdWaterFlowRate.description: The volume of cold water being conveyed by the Plumbing Fixture per second (m3/s). Property has a quantity of type VolumetricFlowRate meassured in [m³/s].

HotWaterFlowRate.description: The volume of hot water being conveyed by the Plumbing Fixture per second (m3/s). Property has a quantity of type VolumetricFlowRate meassured in [m³/s].

DrainageFlowRate.description: The volume of waste/drainage being conveyed by the Plumbing Fixture per second (m3/s). Property has a quantity of type VolumetricFlowRate meassured in [m³/s].

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
